zh.lifeSummary: 當Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor於1176年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾丁萊時，她的父親Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach46歲，母親Mabel FitzWilliam26歲。她於1190年與Hywel ap Trahaearn在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1270年在威爾士格拉莫爾根享年95歲，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor于1176年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾丁萊时，她的父亲Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach46岁，母亲Mabel FitzWilliam26岁。她于1190年与Hywel ap Trahaearn在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1270年在威尔士格拉莫爾根享年95岁，埋葬在威尔士格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

en.lifeSummary: When Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor was born in 1176, in Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, was 46 and her mother, Mabel FitzWilliam, was 26. She married Hywel ap Trahaearn in 1190, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 8 daughters. She died about 1270, in Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 95, and was buried in Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor est née en 1176, à Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzWilliam, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hywel ap Trahaearn en 1190, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1270, à Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Glamorgan, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor 1176 in Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach 46 und ihre Mutter Mabel FitzWilliam 26. Sie hat 1190 in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom Hywel ap Trahaearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb um 1270 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Glamorgan, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor è nata il nel 1176 nel Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Mabel FitzWilliam, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hywel ap Trahaearn nel 1190, nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 8 figlie. Morì circa 1270, nel Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevorが1176年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウルで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Ifor Bachは46歳，母Mabel FitzWilliamは26歳であった。1190年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアでHywel ap Trahaearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1270年にウェールズグラモーガンで95歳で死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor(이)가 1176년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel FitzWilliam(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 Hywel ap Trahaearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 웨일스 글램르건에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor nasceu em 1176, em Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzWilliam, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Hywel ap Trahaearn em 1190, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1270, em Glamorgan, Gales, com 95 anos, e foi sepultada em Glamorgan, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor родилась в 1176 г. в местности даинофр, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzWilliam, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hywel ap Trahaearn в 1190 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла около 1270 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности глэморган, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor nació en 1176, en Dinefwr, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzWilliam, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hywel ap Trahaearn en 1190, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1270, en Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultada en Glamorgan, Gales.
